nodes.label: AI as code generation tool for tedious tasks
nodes.grounding_span: When I am doing small tasks such as creating elements and tedious code for a mobile app, I use AI to help me generate the code for that

nodes.label: AI as comprehension aid for learning concepts
nodes.grounding_span: I also use ChatGPT to help me better understand different concepts as I learn and progress

nodes.label: AI with structured planning for control
nodes.label_negative: AI without upfront planning leading to surprises
nodes.grounding_span: I first ask AI to create a markdown file of the plan... I then edit and make iterations on the markdown file to exactly what I want, so I know exactly what will be implemented and have full control over it

nodes.label: AI as collaborative back-and-forth partner
nodes.grounding_span: I find myself going back-and-forth with it throughout a task. I personally find it important to know what the AI code does exactly, especially when working with a team, thus I try to avoid giving the AI independent tasks

nodes.label: AI use for redundant tasks to free time for bigger problems
nodes.label_negative: AI use for all tasks indiscriminately
nodes.grounding_span: taking advantage of AI can boost your productivity, using AI for more redundant tasks and using the time you save to spend on bigger problems

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment and passion as reserved domain
nodes.label_negative: AI involvement in personally fulfilling tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy discussing and brainstorming potential ideas myself because it is something I am passionate about and find joy in doing so

nodes.label: AI scope control to avoid excessive code changes
nodes.grounding_span: Initially, I was frustrated because the AI would write too much code, although I just asked for simple tasks

nodes.label: Understanding AI-generated code to maintain skills
nodes.label_negative: Blindly accepting AI code leading to skill degradation
nodes.grounding_span: not fully understanding the AI generated solutions could make me forget skills and potentially become worse of a developer overtime

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: boost your productivity

nodes.label: Epistemic understanding and learning
nodes.grounding_span: help me better understand different concepts

nodes.label: Control and predictability
nodes.grounding_span: have full control over it

nodes.label: Personal fulfillment and passion
nodes.grounding_span: something I am passionate about and find joy in doing so

nodes.label: Skill maintenance and professional growth
nodes.grounding_span: maintaining your development skills

nodes.label: Positive adoption of AI for tedious tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI throughout my day and I am even encouraged and taught to by my senior engineers

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's excessive code changes initially
nodes.grounding_span: Initially, I was frustrated because the AI would write too much code

nodes.label: Satisfaction with controlled AI use after learning strategies
nodes.grounding_span: Later on, I got better at controlling the code that the AI writes

nodes.label: Preference for personal involvement in creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy discussing and brainstorming potential ideas myself

nodes.label: Concern about skill degradation from AI overuse
nodes.grounding_span: not fully understanding the AI generated solutions could make me forget skills

nodes.label: Optimistic future reliance on AI for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I envision myself continuing to use AI at work as I progress in my career, hopefully using it to become a more efficient engineer

nodes.label: Structured planning and iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I first ask AI to create a markdown file of the plan... I then edit and make iterations on the markdown file

nodes.label: Back-and-forth engagement to maintain understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I find myself going back-and-forth with it throughout a task
